DISCOVERY 610, MOTION ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. RESPONDENT TONY LEE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS AND FOR SANCTIONS RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PETITIONER IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE CORRESPONDENCE FROM COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER WAS NOT A RESPONSE WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP SECTION 2030(F). FAILURE TO SERVE A TIMELY RESPONSE RELIEVES THE MOVING PARTY FROM THE REQUIREMENTS SET FORTH IN CCP SECTION 2030 (L) AND CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 335. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT AND PETITIONER APPEAR AT 9:00 A.M. ON AUGUST 30, 2004 IN DEPARTMENT 610. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM. BRUCE E. CHAN
